case_title: AMMEL PARK vs. HARVEY, JOETTA et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HARVEY, JOETTA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMMEL PARK SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-30-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARVEY, JOETTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 721 LAGUNA STREET #J, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $100.00 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF SHALL NOT SEEK EXECUTION OF WRIT IF DEFT PAYS TO PLTF THE SUM OF $100 PLUS MONTHLY RENT FOR OCTOBER ON/BEFORE 10-1 96; AND PAYS MONTHLY RENT ON/BEFORE 5TH DAY OF MONTH STARTNG 10-5-96 THRU 2-5-97; AND PAYS $100/MO FOR 5 MOS.IF DEFAULT, PLTF MAY APPLY EX-PARTE TO LIFT STAY; SEE JUDGMENT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMMEL PARK AS TO DEFENDANT HARVEY, JOETTA DOES 1 SUMMONS ISSUED
